info.title: Fields API
info.description: To get the field metadata for the specified module including standard module, custom module, subform module, and linking module in you Zoho CRM account. The fields displayed are from all layouts for the module. The response does not contain layout-specific fields like mandatory fields or picklist values.

get.description: Retrieve all fields metadata for modules. Examples and schemas derived from provided sample and schema files.

parameters.description: Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.
It specifies whether to include the allowed_permissions JSON object in the response
The type of fields to be retrieved. Example: 'used', 'unused', etc.

schema.description: Response object containing an array of fields.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

204.description: No Content. The request was successful and no response body is returned.

400.description: Bad Request — When Invalid Module Name is Given error will be thrown

post.description: To create custom fields in a module in your Zoho CRM account.

parameters.description: Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.

400.description: Bad Request — List of Bad Request that can occure while creating the field

oneOf.description: Response object containing an array of errors.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

patch.description: To update custom fields in your Zoho CRM account.

parameters.description: Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.

400.description: Bad Request — Possible Errors that can occure while updating fields

oneOf.description: Response object containing an array of errors.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

get.description: Retrieve metadata of a specific custom field in a module using the field ID.

parameters.description: Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the custom field to be retrieved
It specifies whether to include the allowed_permissions JSON object in the response
The type of fields to be retrieved. Example: 'used', 'unused', etc.

schema.description: Response object containing an array of fields.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

400.description: Bad Request — canonical error shapes for invalid id, already scheduled, conversion in progress, association limits, or system-defined restrictions.

patch.description: Update a Custom Field with related to specific module of Zoho CRM Account

parameters.description: Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: ID of the custom field to delete

schema.description: Response object containing an array of fields.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

400.description: Bad Request — canonical error shapes for invalid id, already scheduled, conversion in progress, association limits, or system-defined restrictions.

oneOf.description: Response object containing an array of errors.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

delete.description: Delete a custom field from a module. Field must not be used in workflows, approvals, scoring rules, or other configurations. Only one field can be deleted per request.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: ID of the custom field to delete
Module name passed as parameter is case insensitive. For example, the module name 'Leads'.

schema.description: Response object containing an array of fields.

fields.description: An array of field metadata objects.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid field ID, field in use, or missing parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failure or insufficient scope

404.description: Not Found - Invalid URL or field not found

scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.fields.READ: Allows read access to fields in Zoho CRM settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.fields.CREATE: Allows  To create a Custom Field
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.fields.UPDATE: Allows  To Update a Custom Field
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.fields.DELETE: Allows  To Delete a Custom Field
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.fields.ALL: Allows all access to fields in Zoho CRM settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.all: Allows all access to Zoho CRM settings

FieldRequestBodySchema.description: Request body for creating custom fields. Maximum of 5 fields can be created in a single call.

fields.description: List of fields to be created

items.description: list of field need to be created

field_label.description: Unique display label of the field

length.description: Maximum number of characters allowed. Varies by data type.

filterable.description: Indicates whether the field can be used in filters

name.description: Type of tooltip: static_text (shown in field box) or info_icon (shown on icon click)

value.description: Tooltip content. Max 35 chars for static_text, 255 chars for info_icon

profiles.description: Profiles to which the field is to be assigned

external.description: External field configuration for third-party app integration

type.description: user: Different ID per user. org: Common ID for organization

oneOf.description: Field encryption configuration

mode.description: encryption: Store value encrypted. decryption: Store value unencrypted (default)

oneOf.description: Indicates whether field encryption is enabled

type.description: small: 2000 chars, large: 32000 chars, rich_text: 50000 chars

oneOf.description: Field uniqueness configuration

case_sensitive.description: Indicates whether uniqueness is case sensitive

oneOf.description: Indicates whether the field value must be unique across records

hipaa_compliance_enabled.description: Enable HIPAA compliance for this field

actual_value.description: Actual Value it wolud not be changed form initial value

reference_value.description: Reference value to be Userd Internal

colour_code.description: Hex code for the picklist value color

enable_record_state.description: Indicates whether record state is enabled for the picklist field

default_value.description: Default value for the picklist field

pick_list_values_sorted_lexically.description: Indicates whether picklist values are sorted lexically

enable_colour_code.description: Indicates whether colour coding is enabled for the picklist field

id.description: ID of the global picklist to associate with this field

api_name.description: API name of the global picklist

history_tracking_enabled.description: Indicates whether history tracking is enabled for the field

related_list_name.description: Name of the related list for history tracking

duration_configuration.description: Duration for which history is tracked

followed_fields.description: List of fields to be tracked

api_name.description: API name of the field to be tracked

id.description: ID of the field to be tracked

separator.description: Indicates whether to use a thousands separator for number fields

start_number.description: Starting number for the auto number field

_update_existing_records.description: Update existing auto-number records with new format

formula.description: Contains the details of the formula field, including the return type and the expression.

sub_return_type.description: The string return type of the formula will be split values,

dynamic.description: Indicates whether the formula is Auto Refresh

stop_compute_conditionally.description: Indicates whether to stop computation conditionally.

stop_compute_expression.description: Defines the expression that determines when to stop computation

decimal_place.description: The number of decimal places for the formula field. This is valid for double and currency return types. Possible values are from 0 to 9, both inclusive.

number_separator.description: Specify whether to display the field value in formatted view. The default value is true.

precision.description: Represents the number of decimal places displayed for the currency value in the user interface. This value should be less than decimal_place

return_type.description: Return type of the rollup summary

items.description: Expression for the calculation need to be done.
